article.body_preview:
RANGPUR, July 17, 2023 (BSS) - FBCCI Senior Vice-president Mostafa Azad

Chowdhury Babu today called for making the highly prospective jewelry

industry export-oriented to revive its past glory and earn foreign exchequer.

He made the call at a post-rally discussion organised by Rangpur district

unit of Bangladesh Jeweler's Association (BAJUS) to celebrate its 58th

founding anniversary as the chief guest.

President of Rangpur district unit of BAJUS Md Enamul Haque Sohel presided

over the dis

llm_connections.evidence_quote: produce refined gold to meet the local demand and export abroad to earn a huge exchequer,
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly says the refinery will use imported ores and export refined gold abroad, directly discussing country-level imports and exports matching the balance_of_trade scope.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: the process of establishing Gold Bank is progressing fast for development and enriching the thriving jewelry industry to export gold ornaments and gold bars abroad in a very short time
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article states the Gold Bank is being established to enable exports of gold ornaments and bars abroad, which pertains to national exports as defined by balance_of_trade.
